children.name: Paraphyllina
children.description: Paraphyllina — a genus of paraphyllinid jellyfish in the family Paraphyllinidae.

children.name: Paraphyllina intermedia
children.description: Paraphyllina intermedia — a species in the genus Paraphyllina, family Paraphyllinidae. Also known as paraphyllinid jellyfish.

children.name: Paraphyllina ransoni
children.description: Paraphyllina ransoni — a species in the genus Paraphyllina, family Paraphyllinidae. Also known as paraphyllinid jellyfish.

children.name: Paraphyllina rubra
children.description: Paraphyllina rubra — a species in the genus Paraphyllina, family Paraphyllinidae. Also known as paraphyllinid jellyfish.
